item.title: Hidden gems in pi-powerline-footer
item.description: Two features of the pi-powerline-footer plugin that go beyond the typical footer with model information.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: From net-tools to iproute2: command equivalents
item.description: A guide to equivalents between classic net-tools commands (ifconfig, route, arp) and modern iproute2 commands (ip).
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: Record and Share your Terminal Sessions with asciinema
item.description: Discover asciinema, the perfect tool to record your terminal sessions in a lightweight, reproducible, and easy-to-share way.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: broot, a different way to navigate your directories
item.description: broot is a terminal tool for interactive directory exploration with fuzzy search, multiple panels, and file preview.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: `fresh`: My preferred terminal editor for daily use
item.description: Discover fresh, a fast, modern, modeless terminal text editor, ideal for casual file editing, surpassing nano and vim in simplicity for regular use.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: Kitty as a Quick Access Terminal: The Convenience of a Dropdown
item.description: Configure Kitty for instant and efficient access, combining the power of a modern terminal with the convenience of a dropdown.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: Essential Keyboard Shortcuts in Kitty: Mastering Your Terminal
item.description: A quick guide to the most useful Kitty keyboard shortcuts to optimize your command-line workflow.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: From Yakuake to Kitty: My Transition to a Modern Terminal
item.description: Exploring the reasons and benefits of switching from Yakuake to Kitty for a more powerful and customizable terminal experience.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro
